hardware.title: Physical Hardware Setup
hardware.intro: To connect your Epson, HP, or Industrial scanner:
hardware.step1: Set scanner "Auto-Save" path to the folder below.
hardware.step2: Press the physical Scan button on your hardware.

restricted.title: Access Restricted
restricted.desc: Experimental hardware controls are restricted to Laboratory Technicians and Farm Managers. As an Inspector, your portal is focused on data verification and auditing.

batch.subtitle: Analyze multiple samples simultaneously and export consolidated protocols.

dropzone.sub: Up to 50 images for simultaneous analysis

batch.processing_sub: Processing samples sequentially for maximum accuracy

home.title: Precision Grain Analysis for Modern Labs
home.subtitle: The most advanced AI system for grading rice and wheat. Instant segmentation, defect detection, and quality scoring at lab-grade precision.
home.features_sub: Built from the ground up to meet professional laboratory and export standards.

feature1.title: Expert Segmentation
feature1.desc: Deep learning models trained on millions of kernels to identify even overlapping grains with 99.8% precision.

feature2.title: Defect Identification
feature2.desc: Instantly detect broken, chalky, or discolored grains that affect the core quality and export value.

feature3.title: Secure Reporting
feature3.desc: All analysis results are backed up to our secure vault, allowing for historical trends and audit trails.

home.scale_title: Scale your quality control with zero compromises
scale_points: Reduce inspection costs by up to 85%
Automated trend monitoring for farm yield
